productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Vecino Black Casual Shoes
description: buckaroo's roots lie in the dusty Mexican plains and the brand has come up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance, referencing its cowboy-esque origins. A cheeky take on the classic penny loafer, this leather shoe is inspired by trekking shoes in the styling of its outsole. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt.UpperFull grain leather upper with stitch detailing Stitches along the seams of the toe boxElasticated inserts on the tongue with slip-on stylingPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel MidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with a curved midfoot and upraised heelTextured grooves and suction points on the forefoot and heelShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
